prompt: Show me a bash function http_status that takes a URL and prints just the HTTP status code returned.
Show me a bash script that watches a directory $1 for new files and prints each filename when one appears.
response:
while true; do
    inotifywait -e create -q "$1" --format '%f'
done

prompt: Show me a bash script that backs up a directory $1 to a timestamped tar.gz under /tmp.
Show me a bash script that takes a directory argument and prints each file modified in the last hour.
Give me a bash script that lists every process consuming more than 10% CPU.
Write a bash one-liner that removes empty directories recursively under $1.
Write a bash one-liner that finds duplicate lines in $1 sorted by occurrence count desc.
Show me a bash function svc_running that returns 0 if a systemd service $1 is active.
Show me a bash function gitclean that removes all branches merged into main except main.
Show me a bash one-liner that finds duplicate lines in $1 sorted by occurrence count desc.
Give me a bash one-liner that prints the disk usage of each subdirectory sorted by size.
Write a bash function safe_rm that asks for confirmation before deleting.
Give me a bash one-liner that prints the public IP of the current host.
Write a bash script that loops over arguments and echoes each one on its own line.
response:
for arg in "$@"; do
    echo "$arg"
done

Show me a bash script that retries curl https://example.com up to 3 times with a 5-second backoff.
response:
for i in 1 2 3; do
    if curl -fsSL https://example.com; then
        break
    fi
    sleep 5
done
